title: TRANSFORM — Zero-Lift Transfer Technology
titleLarge: Eliminate 100% of manual lifting strain and prevent musculoskeletal injuries
desc: Breakthrough Zero Relative Velocity (ZRV) technology transfers patients with ZERO manual lifting force required. Single-operator control eliminates the need for 2-4 staff members per transfer. Solves the 52-67% nursing MSD crisis.
shortDesc: Zero manual lifting. Single operator. Handles 40-250kg patients. Prevents ₹50,000+ injury costs.
desc1: ALTRAS-1's Zero-Lift technology uses synchronized motorized rollers and pneumatic lifting to transfer patients without any manual force exertion. This directly addresses the root cause of 52-67% of nursing musculoskeletal disorders in India — eliminating back injuries, shoulder strain, and chronic pain from patient handling.
desc2: Single healthcare worker operation compensates for India's 1:670 nurse-patient ratio crisis. Transfers patients weighing 40-250kg across bed-to-stretcher, stretcher-to-OR table, ICU repositioning scenarios. Ergonomic joystick control at standing height prevents bending and awkward postures. Built-in anti-slip surface prevents patient sliding and skin shear injuries.
desc3: Reduces caregiver injury risk by 93% and eliminates 20-45 lost work days per injury incident. Each prevented MSD injury saves hospitals ₹45,000-₹75,000 in direct costs plus productivity losses. Compact design navigates Indian hospital corridors (4-6 feet width). Battery-powered operation handles 15-20 transfers per charge — matching typical nursing shift workload.

title: PROTECT — Integrated Life Support System
titleLarge: Zero-interruption monitoring and emergency medical support during transfers
desc: Medical-grade ECG, SpO₂, NIBP monitoring + Integrated oxygen delivery system (0-15 LPM) + Emergency suction unit + IV line management + Automated vital sign alerts. Eliminates the deadly 'monitor disconnect gap' during transfers.
shortDesc: Continuous vitals monitoring + Emergency oxygen + Suction + Crash cart integration.
desc1: Traditional patient transfers in Indian hospitals create a 2-8 minute 'blind window' when monitors are disconnected. ALTRAS-1 eliminates this lethal gap with seamlessly integrated life support — maintaining uninterrupted visibility into patient condition during the most vulnerable moments. Critical for ICU, post-surgical, and cardiac patients where seconds determine outcomes.
desc2: Onboard Life Support Systems: Medical-grade 3-lead/5-lead ECG monitoring (compatible with BPL, Schiller, Nidek Indian monitors), Pulse oximetry with perfusion index, Non-invasive blood pressure with auto-cycling, Integrated oxygen delivery (mask + nasal cannula, 0-15 LPM flow control), Portable suction unit (20+ kPa vacuum) for airway emergencies, IV pole with 4 hooks and pump compatibility, Medication tray with crash cart drug compatibility, Auto-alert system syncs with hospital nurse call systems.
desc3: Prevents adverse events during transfers — falls, airway obstruction, cardiac events go undetected in traditional transfers. Battery backup (4+ hours) handles Indian power instability. Temperature-controlled compartment for emergency medications. One-touch crash cart alert broadcasts to nearest response team within 3 seconds. Reduces transfer-related complications by 76% and saves critical response time during emergencies.

title: MONITOR — Predictive AI Safety Intelligence
titleLarge: Prevent incidents before they occur with AI-powered risk detection
desc: Predictive AI analyzes 15+ risk factors in real-time to prevent falls, injuries, and complications before they occur. Depth-vision mapping + load distribution sensors + movement prediction algorithms. 100% privacy-compliant (DPDP Act 2023) — zero identifiable data captured.
shortDesc: AI-powered fall prevention and patient safety monitoring.
desc1: Patient falls during transfers cause fractures, head injuries, and even fatalities in Indian hospitals. ALTRAS-1's Predictive AI analyzes body position, weight distribution, patient movement patterns, and vital signs simultaneously — predicting fall risk 3-8 seconds before it occurs. The system automatically activates safety protocols: halts transfer motion, triggers audible/visual alerts, and provides step-by-step corrective guidance to the operator.
desc2: AI Safety Features: Depth-based computer vision maps patient body contours without capturing identifiable images (DPDP Act 2023 compliant), 16-point load cell array detects uneven weight distribution and pressure hotspots, Real-time patient movement analysis predicts agitation or involuntary shifting, Voice guidance in Hindi + 15 regional languages (Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, etc.), Auto-adjusting transfer speed based on patient stability score, Predictive alerts for IV line tension, catheter displacement, breathing tube position, Obstacle detection prevents bed rail/furniture collisions, Emergency stop system (response time <0.3 seconds).
desc3: Reduces transfer-related patient injuries by 87% and caregiver errors by 91%. Cuts average transfer time from 8-12 minutes to 3-5 minutes — critical when nurses handle 10-25 transfers per shift. AI learns from each hospital's unique conditions (corridor width, bed types, patient demographics) and continuously improves. Over 10,000 safe transfers completed in pilot programs across AIIMS Delhi, Apollo Hospitals, and Kerala government facilities. Complete patient privacy maintained — no images stored, only anonymized safety data.

title: ENABLE — Healthcare Workforce Multiplier
titleLarge: Solve the 1:670 nurse shortage crisis with force-multiplying technology
desc: One ALTRAS-1 unit = equivalent capacity of 2-3 additional nursing staff for patient transfers. Designed for Indian realities: ₹80L-₹1.2Cr pricing (vs ₹2Cr+ imports), 170V-270V power tolerance, 4-6 feet corridor navigation, Hindi + 15 regional languages, 100% Made in India.
shortDesc: Multiplies nursing capacity. Costs 60% less than imports. Ruggedized for Indian conditions.
desc1: India needs 2.4 million additional nurses by 2030 — but training takes 3-4 years and retention is only 60%. ALTRAS-1 provides an immediate solution: each unit eliminates the need for 2-3 staff members per patient transfer, effectively multiplying existing workforce capacity by 2-3x for this critical task. Frees up 45-90 minutes per nursing shift that can be redirected to direct patient care, medication administration, and clinical assessment.
desc2: Built for Indian Infrastructure & Economics: Compact footprint (190cm L × 75cm W) navigates narrow 4-6 feet hospital corridors, Wide voltage tolerance (170V-270V AC) with surge protection handles Indian power grid fluctuations, Battery backup (4+ hours) ensures operation during power cuts, Ruggedized components withstand 20-45°C temperature range and high humidity, Pricing: ₹80 lakh - ₹1.2 crore (60% lower than ₹2 crore imported alternatives), ROI achieved in 18-24 months through injury prevention + productivity gains, Multi-lingual voice interface (Hindi, English, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, Punjabi, Odia, Assamese + more), Compatible with Indian hospital beds (mechanical and electric), stretchers, and OR tables.
desc3: Pan-India Ecosystem: Manufacturing in Kerala (Startup India, Kerala Startup Mission certified), Service network across 28 states and 8 union territories, Spare parts availability within 24-48 hours in metro/tier-1 cities, 96 hours in tier-2/tier-3, 24/7 remote diagnostics and troubleshooting via telemedicine protocols, On-site training in regional languages (2-day certification program), Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM) integration for government hospitals, Flexible financing: outright purchase, lease-to-own, pay-per-use models for smaller facilities, Annual maintenance contracts with predictable budgeting (₹8-12 lakh/year). Proven in Indian conditions: deployed in AIIMS, Apollo, government district hospitals, and PHCs.
